youtube.description:
GREETINGS, FELLOW LARPVENTURERS!

My name is Larpurian. I seek out adventures wherever they may be found, from Minecraft to whatever we want to larp. I am always looking to make the most out of every experience, and hopefully, in the end, it'll be a tale worth telling.

My friends, LarplessGoomba, ImmortalLarpai, and Bethany Larp accompany me on my quest through the world of larp gaming.

Join the adventure, and see how deep this larp goes.

youtube.description:
Hi, I'm Larpiplier. I make videos.

From quality content(?) to meme-able garbage, from scary games to full-on non-interactive movies which you wont find it all. You will, actually. I dont have over 5000 videos (yet) so I'm sure there's something you'd DEFINITELY like (soon).

Maybe you like horror games, or funny games, or comedy sketches, or animations, or compilations, or reactions, or reviews, or challenges, or cryptic lore, or mind-crippling ennui, or stuff-that-is-guaranteed-to-probably-make-you-cry (probably not)? Whatever you're into I'm sure there's something for you down in the briny deep of my video page(soon). So why not dive in (there's no water yet dude)?

Or don't (pls do). Life is yours to choose after all.


for SERIOUS business inquiries: Larpiplier@gmail.com
